evals.prompt: Implement the specs in the current repository. Start from Phase 1 and proceed through all phases.
evals.expected_output: Workflow performs repository review, validates spec structure (quality score ≥90%), parses dependencies, implements each phase with user confirmation, performs automatic code review after each phase, generates documentation, tracks progress in .specs-progress.json, completes all phases successfully

evals.prompt: Resume implementation from Phase 3. The workflow was interrupted after completing Phase 2.
evals.expected_output: Workflow detects existing .specs-progress.json, validates Phase 3 dependencies are satisfied (Phases 1-2 completed), displays Phase 3 overview, requests user confirmation, implements Phase 3 with code review and documentation, updates progress, continues to remaining phases

evals.prompt: Implement specs using TDD approach. Start from Phase 1 and write tests before implementation for each phase.
evals.expected_output: Workflow confirms TDD approach before each phase, writes unit tests first for each task, implements code to pass tests, runs test suite with ≥80% coverage, performs code review, generates documentation, tracks progress with test completion status
